name: theme
description: Semantic CSS variables (background, foreground, muted, border, destructive, primary…) with first-class dark and light, plus the Tailwind preset that wires them up. The token layer every ibirdui component speaks.

intents: set up the design tokens for ibirdui components
tailwind colour mapping for background, muted, destructive, primary
examples: import ibirdui from "./tailwind.preset"; export default { presets: [ibirdui] };
